Latest reels

Save each video from Drive, add a trending audio, paste the caption. Lean 5 hashtags (IG favours 3–5); tap “extra tags” for a first-comment set.

BARCELONA · RUS v HAM TIME

The seconds · real-time

0.064s — the whole story, as one number.

0.064 seconds. That's the whole story of Barcelona qualifying.
Watch the gap between Russell and Hamilton breathe across the lap — teal when Russell's gaining, blue when Hamilton fights back.

Real telemetry (FastF1) · no VFX — this is the actual data.
Follow @feelthelap for the numbers you can feel.

#F1 #Formula1 #Russell #Hamilton
#F1 #Formula1 #F1Telemetry #F1Data #Russell #Hamilton #Verstappen #RedBullRacing #Mercedes #F1Reels #Qualifying #PolePosition
Create a cinematic, photorealistic VERTICAL 9:16 Instagram cover poster.
BACKGROUND: a modern Formula 1-style open-wheel race car at speed through a dramatic floodlit grand prix circuit, golden-hour dusk light, glamorous high-stakes atmosphere, low dramatic angle close to the tarmac, motion blur, glossy asphalt reflections, shot on 85mm, ultra-detailed car, 8k, high dynamic range. No real driver faces, no real team logos or sponsor decals.
ADD CLEAN, CRISP TEXT rendered in a bold condensed motorsport font, spelled EXACTLY:
  - top, small amber: FEEL THE LAP
  - under it, small grey caps: BARCELONA · QUALIFYING · 2026
  - lower-centre, HUGE bold amber number: 0.064
  - directly under the number, white: SECONDS   then smaller grey: THE POLE GAP
  - bottom, teal then blue: RUSSELL  vs  HAMILTON
Add a dark gradient over the bottom third so the text stays perfectly legible. Premium, high-contrast, scroll-stopping sports-broadcast aesthetic. Keep every character sharp and correctly spelled.

03

Posting each reel

  1. Open FeelTheLap-PostKit in the Drive app → the video → Save to device.
  2. Instagram → new Reel → pick the saved video.
  3. Add a trending audio — reels are silent by design; big reach lever.
  4. Tap Copy caption above, paste it in.
  5. Cover: scrub to the big-number frame. Share to Reels + Feed.
Tip: post the pole-gap reel Saturday night after qualifying.
FEEL THE LAP · REAL TELEMETRY, MADE VISIBLE · FASTF1
Copied!
